mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER ( IDX, USER_ID, USER_PWD, USER_NAME, EMAIL, POSITION, REG_DATE, BIRTH_DATE ) VALUES ( MEMBER_SEQUENCE.NEXTVAL, #{user_id}, #{user_pwd}, #{user_name}, #{email}, #{position}, SYSDATE, #{birth_date, jdbcType=DATE} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER WHERE USER_ID=#{user_id}
SELECT * FROM MEMBER WHERE USER_ID=#{user_id} AND USER_PWD=#{user_pwd}
SELECT USER_ID FROM MEMBER WHERE USER_NAME=#{user_name} AND BIRTH_DATE=TO_DATE(#{birth_date},'YYYY-MM-DD')
SELECT * FROM MEMBER WHERE USER_ID = #{user_id} AND EMAIL = #{email}
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET USER_PWD = #{tempPwd} WHERE USER_ID = #{user_id}
UPDATE MEMBER SET USER_NAME = #{user_name}, USER_PWD = #{user_pwd}, EMAIL = #{email}, POSITION = #{position}, IMG = #{img} WHERE USER_ID = #{user_id}
